meta.culinary_role_pairing_rule: NUT-PAIR-001: wine pairing follows the ingredient's culinary role — almond flour for baking, peanut butter for rich spreads, tahini for savory sesame paste, pumpkin seed for roasted garnish, chia seed for lightly prepared applications.
meta.nut001_classification_rule: NUT-001: culinary group assignment remains authoritative in pairing semantics — peanut in Peanuts, almond in Tree Nuts, sesame in Edible Seeds.
meta.nut002_ownership_rule: NUT-002: processed canonical entities retain distinct pairing profiles and must not inherit wine relationships from whole nut or seed forms.
meta.pairing_philosophy: Curated editorial pairing knowledge for nuts and seeds — NUT-PAIR-001 pairs by culinary function, not botanical classification alone.
